title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: Jennifer Ranallo has been married to former baseball player and entrepreneur Jack Ranallo for ten years. However, when his bluff is called, she discovers who her husband really is.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: Michelle Miller finds herself falling in love with a military man. They embark on an affair until one of them pays the ultimate price for love.

title: Django Unchained
desc: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

title: Poseidon
desc: On New Year's Eve, the luxury ocean liner Poseidon capsizes after being swamped by a rogue wave. Later, the survivors are left to fight for their lives as they attempt to escape the sinking ship.

title: Spider-Man 2
desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
desc: After Kris and her boyfriend Dean die due to a mysterious dream, Nancy, their friend, who has been having similar dreams realises that the killer finds his victims when they fall asleep.

title: Godzilla
desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York City in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

title: Food Factory
desc: Discover how fruit leather, addictive cheese curds and zingy guacamole are created from raw materials to finished products.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In Patagonia, Bear skins a hare, scales a cliff, tracks a puma, drinks dirty water and crosses the Perito Moreno Glacier, a labyrinth of ice caves and crevasses.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In Scotland's Cairngorm Mountains, adventurer Bear Grylls faces arctic blizzards, traps rabbits for food and uses a deer skin for shelter.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon, Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets and even eating mud.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sun stroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly salt water crocodiles.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
desc: Come party in Phoenix, Arizona at the California Tropic Pageant where the Ultimate Grand Supreme will win a modeling contract with pageant fashion company Hollywood Babe.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: Professional boxer Christy Martin is abused and blackmailed by her sadistic husband. But when he stabs her multiple times will she survive the ultimate fight?

title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
desc: Tasked with a covert mission, Chan Ka-Kui hunts down an arms dealer, facing deadly traps, high-speed chases and gravity-defying stunts in his pursuit of justice.

title: Spider-Man 2
desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
desc: After Kris and her boyfriend Dean die due to a mysterious dream, Nancy, their friend, who has been having similar dreams realises that the killer finds his victims when they fall asleep.

title: Godzilla
desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York City in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

title: Charlie's Angels
desc: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Dolphin Tale 2
desc: Sawyer and Dr Clay Haskett embark on an ambitious mission to find a companion for Winter, a rescued bottlenose dolphin, after its sole companion and surrogate mother, Panama, dies.
